characters.description: An Architect and Bamboo Viper candidate who returns to the trial seven days late after an ordeal in the Infernal Realm. He hides a sealed Apocalypse Hoop, cannot safely synchronize, and is assigned to Rung Four while suffering damage to his spirit pathways.
characters.name: Ruwen Starfield

characters.description: Leader of Rung One and a hostile debtor who objects to Ruwen entering the trial. Ruwen can perceive her hostility, and he disables the mechanism she previously used to send him into the Infernal Realm.
characters.name: Echo

characters.description: One of the three founders conducting the Bamboo Viper master trial. She can conceal herself and move through Shadow Steps. Dusk helps open the first test, where Ruwen's late arrival gives his assigned rung a shared seven-hour daylight penalty.
characters.name: Dusk

characters.description: One of the three Bamboo Viper founders administering the master trial. Mist helps assign Ruwen to Rung Four after his late arrival, leaving his place in the clan dependent on the weakest group's acceptance and his performance in the tests.
characters.name: Mist

characters.description: One of the three Bamboo Viper founders who opens the master trial. Thorn helps establish the conditions under which Ruwen must earn acceptance from Rung Four and complete the tests to retain his place in the clan.
characters.name: Thorn

characters.description: A divine sliver sheltered within Ruwen's mind. Its presence causes his Unworthy Vessel condition and blocks synchronization, while both it and Overlord are currently absent from his accessible inner world.
characters.name: Uru's mental shard

characters.description: Ruwen's student, close companion, and fellow step fighter. He is present at the Bamboo Viper master trial when Ruwen returns from the Infernal Realm.
characters.name: Sift

characters.description: An independent intelligence associated with Ruwen's mental world. It is currently absent from his accessible inner world alongside Uru's fragment.
characters.name: Overlord

characters.description: A sentient dungeon keeper for whom Ruwen preserves living grass and flowers in his dimensional storage. Ruwen accepts a continuing energy cost to keep the specimens alive until Fractal can receive them, showing that the collection has a specific purpose.
characters.name: Fractal

characters.description: Ruwen's partner and an urgent reason for him to return home. He plans to find her after the trial while facing crime, civil conflict, and other crises in Eiru. His prolonged absence and succession of emergencies make that reunion an increasingly important obligation.
characters.name: Hamma

characters.description: An ally Ruwen intends to locate as soon as he returns home. She is Hamma's companion, and their situation is part of the growing burden he has postponed while moving from one life-threatening crisis to another. Finding her is one of his urgent homeward responsibilities.
characters.name: Lylan

characters.description: A trusted companion Ruwen names among the people he must find after returning home, alongside Hamma and Lylan. Reconnecting with Rami is one of several personal responsibilities competing with the crises in Eiru and his current obligation to the Bamboo Viper candidates.
characters.name: Rami

characters.description: Sift's parent and a Bamboo Viper Grandmaster who tests selected champions on the tower's third floor. Madda embodies the Viper side of the paired discipline and mirrors each challenger's movements beside Padda while a strict timer limits the attempt.
characters.name: Madda

characters.description: Sift's parent and a Bamboo Viper Grandmaster who tests selected champions beside Madda on the tower's third floor. Padda represents the Bamboo side of the discipline and mirrors a challenger's movements until the timed gate closes.
characters.name: Padda

characters.description: A sentient divine-metal fortune golem with a dimensional pocket, a talent for theft, and an aura of misfortune. It must choose its user and offers Ruwen a reading in return for something he values, despite the serious risk created by its karmatic imbalance.
characters.name: Tarot

characters.description: A powerful Shadow Realm warden that can pin and manipulate shadows. It immobilizes Ruwen, questions whether he is hiding a true shadow, and treats him as an uncertain Lightwalker rather than a simple enemy.
characters.name: Gloomstalker

characters.description: Sift's immense tortoise companion, found after going missing and returned to his pocket. She can cross extraordinary distances and expand to planetary scale, and Sift is more attached to her than he readily admits.
characters.name: Elder Star Tortoise

characters.description: A powerful cultivator that claims the lava pools on Savage Island as its territory. It joins the creatures converging on Ruwen after his search for crossing stones draws attention in the lava.
characters.name: Ash Specter

characters.description: An elite infernal cultivator who leads demons through an Infernal Crossing Ring while Ruwen and the Bamboo Viper adepts attempt to destroy it. She asserts the Savage Champion's and Infernal Realm's claim to the portal as reinforcements gather behind her.
characters.name: Scourge Queen

characters.description: A diamond-level infernal cultivator who emerges behind the Scourge Queen as an army begins crossing through the ring under attack. The commander's arrival raises the immediate threat just as Ruwen prepares a final attempt to destroy the portal.
characters.name: Scourge Commander

characters.description: A dimensional-storage guardian who supplies urgent treatment after Ruwen contains the crossing-ring explosion. Although furious about the consequences, she provides powerful healing and protective creatures that stabilize his severe injuries after Tarot bargains for her help.
characters.name: Blapy

characters.description: The true identity behind Blapy and the adjudicator of Ruwen's storage pact. Her active body is a clone, while her original self remains in the Third Secret preserving its spirit reserves and containing the expanding blast in her vaults.
characters.name: Miranda

characters.description: Champion Fortress's hostile demon champion, a diamond-level cultivator armed with toxic attacks and poison barbs. It confronts Ruwen and Sift on the roof, where Sift challenges it for the champion role.
characters.name: Scourge Champion

characters.description: A hostile infernal aspect who appears at Champion Fortress with Plague when the coordinated attack on Ruwen, Sift, and the newly recognized masters begins. Pestilence is part of the five-member force that separates Ruwen and Sift from the exposed group at Victory Lake.
characters.name: Pestilence

characters.description: A hostile infernal aspect who arrives beside Pestilence as three more aspects ride toward the Bamboo Viper masters at Victory Lake. Plague's presence helps Ruwen recognize that the five-part disaster predicted by Tarot has begun.
characters.name: Plague

characters.description: One of five hostile infernal aspects coordinating an attack on the new Bamboo Viper masters. War rides toward the group at Victory Lake while Ruwen and Sift are separated from them at Champion Fortress, turning the pearl outing into a rescue crisis.
characters.name: War

characters.description: One of five hostile infernal aspects advancing on the newly recognized Bamboo Viper masters during the coordinated assault at Champion Fortress and Victory Lake. Drought rides with War and Poison as Pestilence and Plague confront Ruwen and Sift.
characters.name: Drought

characters.description: A hostile infernal aspect riding with War and Drought toward the exposed Bamboo Viper masters as the five-part attack begins. Poison is part of the coordinated force that Tarot's earlier warning described and that Ruwen must now race to stop.
characters.name: Poison

characters.description: The last living member of Rung Four after War infiltrates the refuge and kills the other masters. She is wounded and held hostage as Ruwen and Sift confront the scale of the attack. Her survival leaves her as the only remaining representative of the close group Ruwen helped train.
characters.name: Sole Rung Four Survivor

characters.description: Echo's aspect form and the daughter of the infernal lord commanding the attackers. She arrives after the massacre, stops the other aspects, orders the hostage released, and ends the immediate assault despite her family connection to the enemy.
characters.name: Death Aspect
